1.description: retrieve Trondheim municipality geometry for spatial filtering

2.description: inspect high risk class value from skredrisikokvikkleireklasse lookup table

3.description: retrieve quick-clay hazard areas with high risk class within Trondheim municipality

4.description: retrieve buildings in Trondheim municipality that intersect high risk quick-clay hazard areas

5.description: compute centroid of Trondheim municipality geometry

6.description: calculate distance from each intersecting building to municipality centroid

7.description: sort buildings by distance to centroid ascending

candidates.database_description: Quick clay hazard zone data, including hazard classes, consequence classes, and risk classes for areas with potential large quick-clay landslides.

Building and cadastral building data from Matrikkelen, including building points (representasjonspunkt), building type, building number, current building status, municipality attributes, and identifiers for linking buildings to addresses and properties.
Cadastral parcel data from Matrikkelen, including parcel polygons, parcel identifiers, municipality attributes, parcel area, and metadata for linking parcels to cadastral property units.
Snow avalanche susceptibility data showing areas that may be exposed to snow avalanche hazard. Useful for spatial overlay with buildings and parcels in hazard analysis.
Flood hazard susceptibility data showing areas with potential flood risk. Suitable for first-pass flood exposure analysis, municipality-level planning, and spatial overlay with buildings and parcels.

1.description: get Trondheim municipality geometry for spatial filtering

2.description: get highest risk class identifier for quick-clay hazard

3.description: get quick-clay hazard polygons for Trondheim municipality with high risk class

4.description: get buildings in Trondheim municipality that intersect high-risk quick-clay hazard areas

5.description: compute centroid of Trondheim municipality geometry

6.description: calculate distance from each intersecting building to municipality centroid

7.description: collapse to one row per building with minimum distance

candidates.database_description: Quick clay hazard zone data, including hazard classes, consequence classes, and risk classes for areas with potential large quick-clay landslides.

Building and cadastral building data from Matrikkelen, including building points (representasjonspunkt), building type, building number, current building status, municipality attributes, and identifiers for linking buildings to addresses and properties.
Cadastral parcel data from Matrikkelen, including parcel polygons, parcel identifiers, municipality attributes, parcel area, and metadata for linking parcels to cadastral property units.

2.description: get highest quick-clay risk class identifier

3.description: get quick-clay hazard areas with highest risk class

5.description: find buildings intersecting quick-clay hazard areas

candidates.database_description: Quick clay hazard zone data, including hazard classes, consequence classes, and risk classes for areas with potential large quick-clay landslides.

Building and cadastral building data from Matrikkelen, including building points (representasjonspunkt), building type, building number, current building status, municipality attributes, and identifiers for linking buildings to addresses and properties.
Cadastral parcel data from Matrikkelen, including parcel polygons, parcel identifiers, municipality attributes, parcel area, and metadata for linking parcels to cadastral property units.
Snow avalanche susceptibility data showing areas that may be exposed to snow avalanche hazard. Useful for spatial overlay with buildings and parcels in hazard analysis.
Flood hazard susceptibility data showing areas with potential flood risk. Suitable for first-pass flood exposure analysis, municipality-level planning, and spatial overlay with buildings and parcels.
